历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Physics Category were approximately 1336 → 1311 → 1288 → 1090 → 991, showing a continuous upward trend (ranking numbers decreasing year by year). Over the past 3 years, the ranking has moved forward by about 297 places, with a baseline of approximately 991 in 2025, indicating increasing popularity year by year. The enrollment plan for this university in Liaoning Province for the Physics Category was 75 in 2021, 73 from 2022 to 2025, and increased to 78 in 2026, an expansion of 5 students (about 6.85%) compared to 2025, which is limited and has little effect on alleviating competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Institute of Technology is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranked 19th in 2021 → 18th in 2022 → 16th in 2023 → 14th in 2024 → 13th in 2025 → 14th in 2026, consistently in the top 15 nationally, with a very high level and strong appeal to high-scoring students. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, involving teacher ethics incidents (such as the Gong Lin incident), but the school handled it quickly and received positive recognition. Douyin popularity ranking is 47th (relatively hot), with moderate short video exposure. No obvious record of admission gaps was found, and overall public opinion impact is limited. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 12 disciplines rated A- or above, including Information and Communication Engineering A+, Control Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Mechanical Engineering A, Optical Engineering A, etc., which are highly matched with the university's enrollment majors, with top national discipline strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, closely aligned with BIT's advantageous disciplines. In 2026, the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Liaoning Province is about 200,000, with an estimated Physics Category of about 143,600 based on recent proportions, roughly the same as in 2025. The provincial control line (Physics Category undergraduate batch) has been stable at 360–368 points in recent years, with no significant fluctuations. Beijing Institute of Technology is located in Beijing, which has a strong regional appeal to Liaoning candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Liaoning's Physics Category is about 0.05%, which is a normal cross-provincial enrollment ratio.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward movement of historical rankings (intensified competition), the small expansion in 2026 (alleviating competition), the very high university level with continuously rising rankings, and the high match between advantageous disciplines and popular majors, it is expected that the popularity of applications in 2026 will continue to heat up, with the ranking slightly moving forward from the 2025 baseline of 991. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1012, with a range of 897–1127.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (897–1127), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Information Science and Technology/Electronic Information Experimental Class as the main direction. Tier 1 Excellence Class/Future Precision Engineering Technology/Xu Teli Talent Class can be attempted as a stretch (requiring a ranking significantly better than the lower limit of the range). Tier 3 Aerospace and Mechanical and Electrical Engineering can serve as a safety option. BIT has extremely strong engineering strength, and each major category contains popular directions. It is recommended to choose based on personal interests.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class, ranked among the top 15 nationally by Soft Science, with strong brand appeal to liberal arts candidates. 预测结论.text: Considering the significant ranking advance in 2025 (intensified competition), unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, strong brand appeal but limited liberal arts programs, it is expected that the 2026 ranking will fluctuate slightly around the 2025 baseline of 573. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 583, with a range of 517–649.
